description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, rectangular black glass-ceramic surface with four distinct cooking zones, each outlined by subtle markings. The right side of the cooktop is equipped with a control panel that includes digital displays, touch-sensitive buttons, and labeled indicators for each burner. The control panel is organized in a vertical row, with each section corresponding to a specific burner, and includes power, timer, and temperature controls. The cooktop's surface is highly reflective and smooth, suggesting a premium finish. No physical knobs or dials are present, emphasizing a modern, minimalist design. There are no visible brand markings or power cords on the exterior.
description: A modern, black glass-ceramic induction cooker with four burners and a digital touch control panel on the side. The surface is sleek, reflective, and features clearly marked cooking zones.
description_view_0: The induction cooker is seen from an angle highlighting the right-side control panel with digital displays and touch buttons, and the four cooking zones are clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the cooktop from the front, displaying all four burners and the control panel sections aligned along the near edge.
description_view_2: The left-side perspective reveals the control panel on the left, with the four cooking zones extending to the right.
description_view_3: A rear view of the cooktop, showing the four cooking zones with the control panel sections now at the far edge.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located along one edge of the cooktop, divided into four sections, each with a digital display, touch-sensitive buttons, and labeled indicators. Each section corresponds to a burner and includes power, timer, and temperature controls, all arranged in a vertical row.
